lore.english:
Taimanin. Gosha Academy student. A cousin of Uehara Rin, the Volt Taimanin, and an Elec Art user. Unlike Volt Art, Elec Art uses the weak electricity that exists in living organisms, and its power is known to be similar to static electricity.

People usually make fun of Elec Art users, saying they are suitable for electricity maintenance since they are immune to electricity. Elec Art is normally considered to be unsuitable for combat, and Shikanosuke seems to agree with it.

Unlike this conceived notion, "Elec Art: Sonar", which detects nearby terrain or the placement of objects via reflected electrical waves, is considerably useful in nullifying an enemy's hallucination, as well as a covert operation, which is the main job of a ninja.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Throw Kunai[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy by throwing 3 shurikens.
Each time a [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack] lands, increases the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of all skills by 1 turn.
skills.description_readable:
Attacks the enemy by throwing 3 shurikens.
Each time a [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack] lands, increases the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of all skills by 1 turn.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Elec Art: Spark[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy 4 times by releasing electricity from the palm.
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:800202]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
Target hit is inflicted with [&ElecShock] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:800204]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:800204] turn(s)
If the target is already inflicted with [&ElecShock], additionally inflicts [&Stun] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:800203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:800203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Elec Art: Lightning Tackle[-]
skills.description:
Charges at the enemy with electricity coursing through the character.
Reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target hit by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:800302]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:800302]%[-] chance.
Gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:800303])[-] [&DmgBlockCount] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:800303] turn(s)
If [&Color_Orange][&Tbl_Unit_Name_32][-] is deployed, applies the same effect to [&Color_Orange][&Tbl_Unit_Name_32][-].
